mapper.select: WITH member_names AS ( SELECT sm.signup_id, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(u2.first_name, u2.last_name) SEPARATOR '、') FROM signup_member sm2 JOIN user u2 ON sm2.member_id = u2.id WHERE sm2.signup_id = sm.signup_id ) AS members FROM signup_member sm WHERE sm.signup_id = #{account.signupId} GROUP BY sm.signup_id ) SELECT #{account.account} AS account, s.team_name, sc.name AS school, COALESCE(mn.members, '') AS teamMembers, CONCAT(uc.first_name, uc.last_name) AS prize_coach, #{area} AS area, s.occupation_quota_type AS type, #{account.password} AS password FROM signup s LEFT JOIN school sc ON s.school_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN member_names mn ON s.id = mn.signup_id LEFT JOIN user uc ON s.prize_coach_id = uc.id WHERE s.id = #{account.signupId}
